note: Static model-candidate registry seeded into source_locks via support_scripts/seed_model_candidates.py. First-party comfy-local-mcp remains private-test/unverified; adopt when public.

candidates.notes: Checkpoints krea/krea-2-raw + krea/Krea-2-Turbo (8-step distilled). uv sync and OSS_RAW/OSS_TURBO env vars are for its own inference scripts, not ComfyUI. README lists ComfyUI as a platform but states no VRAM/size figures: preflight must capture checkpoint sizes and the ComfyUI loading path before download approval. First live target on the local 16GB RTX 5080.

Official ComfyUI-format repackage of Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image-Turbo (6B S3-DiT, 8-step, fits 8-16GB VRAM, ~Nov 2025). Use for 12GB public-min verification before pushes. Also a MrFlow-supported base family.

Staged low-res sampling + Real-ESRGAN x2 + brief hi-res refinement; 10x+ claimed; arXiv 2607.01642 (July 2026). Requires a base checkpoint from FLUX.1-dev / Qwen-Image / FLUX.2-Klein / Z-Image families. ComfyUI-MrFlow custom node ships in-repo; custom-node install is owner-approved (arbitrary code). VRAM effect unverified: capture at preflight.

Title confirmed: MuSViT: A Foundation Vision Model for Sheet Music Representation (2026-06-30). MAE-pretrained ViT on ~9.7M IMSLP pages. Released weights UNCONFIRMED; mark weights availability unverified. Future evidence/vision lane, not ComfyUI text-to-image.

Title confirmed: LiveEdit: Towards Real-Time Diffusion-Based Streaming Video Editing (2026-06-25). 4-step streaming editor, 12.66 FPS on unstated hardware. No weights/code link confirmed; paper reference only.
Hosted-only (Gemini app, Flow, AI Studio, Gemini API); subscription-gated; no local weights. Capability list carries a checked-on date; hosted surfaces change without notice.
Title confirmed: Seedance 2.0: Advancing Video Generation for World Complexity (ByteDance). Hosted open platform is NOT open weights; no params/weights published. Never encode as locally runnable.

Dormant: last push 2024-09-13, ~6 commits, 16 open issues. Pin is the current default-branch HEAD. Tested on 80GB A100, CUDA 11.8, torch 2.0.1; no Windows mention. README smaller-GPU claim rendered ambiguously; re-read the raw README before recording any min-VRAM number.

Verbatim README: 'The code is currently tested only on Linux.' Also requires 24GB+ NVIDIA; double disqualification for local Windows 16GB. Active (pushed 2026-06-05). nvdiffrast/nvdiffrec carry NVIDIA source-code terms distinct from MIT; both licenses recorded.

llama-server documents /v1/chat/completions, /v1/embeddings, and rerank aliases /rerank /v1/rerank /reranking /v1/reranking (needs --embedding --pooling rank; flag surface drifts across builds). Windows x64 CUDA 12/13 prebuilt zips per release. Pin a build tag, never latest. Separate B* backend design, not a ComfyUI backend.

299 stars, pushed 2026-07-08. Node>=22 (local v22.21.1 OK). Tools include enqueue_workflow/get_job_status/list_output_images/validate_workflow/start_comfyui/stop_comfyui. Fully-local default; auto-detect probes C-drive paths so COMFYUI_URL is always passed explicitly; never set COMFYUI_API_KEY or --tunnel. Server version pinned at bakeoff time.
378 stars; quiet since 2026-02-17. Serves streamable-http at 127.0.0.1:9000 via python server.py, NOT stdio; fails the stdio bakeoff gate. Recorded for completeness.

candidates.role: MCP bakeoff candidate (TypeScript, stdio; not on npm)
candidates.notes: 15 stars; quiet since 2026-01-28. stdio default with COMFYUI_URL env, but not published to npm (needs git clone + npm build, or Docker); fails the reproducible-local-launch gate. Recorded for completeness.
